_comment: Synthetic discovery intake for one account, produced from the adoption questionnaire and workflow-discovery sessions. No real data. Feeds the prioritization matrix; see sample-output.md.
champion: Innovation lead, ~0.5 FTE allocated, can reach a sponsoring partner

candidateWorkflows.name: NDA first-pass review

candidateWorkflows.mandatoryReview: partner sign-off on the marked-up NDA
candidateWorkflows.confidentiality: approved environment; synthetic NDA set exists

candidateWorkflows.name: Clause comparison across versions
candidateWorkflows.mandatoryReview: associate confirms changes; partner reviews material ones

candidateWorkflows.name: Document / issue summary
candidateWorkflows.trigger: partner asks for a quick read on a memo or facts
candidateWorkflows.mandatoryReview: associate rewrites to firm register before it reaches a partner

candidateWorkflows.name: Litigation research memo
